steps.title: Identify the core reason
steps.content: The passage directly states: “How we define a neighborhood and its boundaries is subjective, so the team used a clustering algorithm to locate dense groupings of amenities...” This reveals the decisive signal: the subjectivity problem prompted the team to use the algorithm.

steps.title: Apply the reason to the choices
steps.content: Choice B captures the stated reason: the algorithm gave the team an objective way to identify neighborhoods. Choices A, C, and D cite customer awareness, business closures, and predicting success—topics the passage never presents as reasons for using the algorithm. That matches choice B — B is correct.
